task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the audit report detailing the cryptographic vulnerabilities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'audit_report.txt' open in a text editor or its contents displayed in the terminal.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the Python files within the 'crypto_utils' directory for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing files from the 'crypto_utils' folder open in an IDE or text editor.

task_completion.description: Agent modifies the code in 'crypto_utils' to remediate the identified cryptographic vulnerabilities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing active editing or saved changes in the 'crypto_utils' files, such as replacing weak hashing algorithms, updating cipher modes, or fixing key generation.

task_completion.description: Agent executes the data processing pipeline script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the terminal command 'python process_dataset.py' (or similar) being executed and completing without errors.

task_completion.description: Agent verifies the generation of the encrypted dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'data/output_encrypted.csv' in a file explorer, listed in a terminal via 'ls', or opened in an editor.

integrity.description: Check that the agent actually modified the 'crypto_utils' files instead of just creating a mock output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of code changes in the 'crypto_utils' directory before the output file is generated.

integrity.description: Check that the output file was generated by running the script, not manually created.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the successful execution of 'process_dataset.py' leading to the creation of the output file.

integrity.description: Check that the agent did not bypass the encryption process by commenting out encryption steps in the pipeline.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'process_dataset.py' script should not show evidence of encryption functions being commented out or bypassed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/workspace/fintech_crypto/data/output_encrypted.csv, which is generated by encrypting the real-world UCI Bank Marketing Dataset. The agent acts as an Information Security Engineer at a FinTech startup and must fix vulnerabilities in the 'crypto_utils' library to ensure the 'process_dataset.py' pipeline runs successfully.
